title: Better invisible armor model
description: A lightweight resource pack that makes the armor invisible.
body:
Do you run a vanilla roleplay server where skins are used for roleplay? Or do just want a more sleek look to your charicter? This pack is perfect for everything!! It makes the armor completely invisible. It also makes the trims completely disappear. (I noticed a few invisible armor packs keep trims.)

  ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  The resource pack was made for 1.21.5 but will work with most modern versions. I reccomend you make it a required resource pack on a vanilla roleplay server, so users dont need a bunch of mods. The pack comes with custom item textures too!! It edits the 6 main armor sets and the turtle helmet.
